mapper.select: SELECT id, type, project_id, relate_ids, sort FROM xm_project_relate WHERE is_delete = 0 AND type IN (1, 3) AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT *, relate_ids AS ids FROM xm_project_relate WHERE is_delete = 0 AND type = 2 AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort

select b.id as id, b.course_name as name, 1 as type, b.course_introduce as content from xm_project_relate a left join xm_course b on a.relate_ids = b.id where a.project_id = #{projectId} and b.is_delete = 0 and a.is_delete = 0 and a.type = 2 group by b.id order by a.sort
SELECT * FROM xm_project_relate A WHERE A.sort < #{sort} AND A.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY A.sort DESC LIMIT 0, 1
SELECT * FROM xm_project_relate A WHERE A.sort > #{sort} AND A.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY A.sort ASC LIMIT 0, 1
